span.p:
D1 · SQLite
one query at a time per DB
10 GB · shard by tenant

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
R2 · object storage
EGRESS FREE · $0.015 per GB-month

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
KV · eventually consistent
up to 60 s to propagate

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Durable Objects
one instance per ID · strongly consistent

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Queues · guaranteed delivery
batch · retry · dead-letter

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Needs read-after-write?
then NOT KV · use D1 or a Durable Object
